companies.name: NeoDiset
companies.shortDescription: NeoDiset, founded in 2000, provides innovative digital technologies for industry, specializing in industrial automation, turnkey software development, robotics, and artificial vision. The company creates and implements its own IoM (Internet of Machines) and MHM (Machine‑Human‑Machine) systems that interconnect equipment via data networks, enable remote monitoring on devices such as phones, tablets or smartwatches, and automatically notify technicians of faults to improve response time. NeoDiset also conducts industrial research, development and technological innovation (I+D+I). || NeoDiset, founded in 2000, provides innovative digital technologies for industry, specializing in industrial automation, turnkey software development, robotics, and artificial vision. The company creates and implements its own IoM (Internet of Machines) and MHM (Machine‑Human‑Machine) systems that interconnect equipment via data networks, enable remote monitoring on devices such as phones, tablets or smartwatches, and automatically notify technicians of faults to improve response time. NeoDiset also conducts industrial research, development and technological innovation (I+D+I). | Ingeniería proyectos, rincheval, plantas de aglomerado, robótica industrial, vision artificial

companies.name: PNEUSCAN
companies.shortDescription: About Automatic Drive-thru tire check in seconds Impressum VENTECH Systems GmbH 46284 Dorsten Germany CEO: André Weisz Company Overview VENTECH Systems GmbH with its headquarters in Dorsten, Germany, is the world market leader in the field of stationary tire inspection system. Having been distin ... guished with various innovation and business awards, VENTECH Systems continues to develop and distribute diagnostic systems for the automated inspection of tires. Quality, sound experience and high innovation as well as technological potential have made VENTECH Systems a valuable partner in this field. For almost a decade now, PNEUSCAN has been the core of it all. Developed, produced and installed locally and internationally with premium quality components manufactured with German expertise. The unique system warns about incorrect tire pressure and insufficient tread depth. Furthermore, it detects irregular tire tread wear patterns and determines axle load and vehicle gross weight. There is no necessity for any adjustment neither on the vehicle nor the tires. It can be used indoors and outdoors. Many renowned companies in various industrial fields have been relying on PNEUSCAN’s stationary tire inspection system for years, to increase profitability and safety. The system has been in use as service and maintenance application for e. g. freight forwarders, car dealers, tire dealers, service centers, public and private bus companies as well as in fleet management - whilst also being able to be integrated to meet the clients unique process requirements, simply! See More PNEUSCAN systems work together to provide a total pressure and tread depth check system for buses, trucks, cars, heavy lift, and other specialty vehicles. PNEUS ... CAN also indicates axle load and total vehicle weight. With PNEUSCAN technology in place, annoying and time-consuming manual tire checking will become a thing of the past, as will tire related road-side breakdowns. On top, globalisation speeds up the course of action. At the same time, people and markets expect optimum quality and service - as fast as possible. To keep up, one needs perfect preconditions such as an automatic tire control system. See More General Information Regular tire checks serve as a basis for a significant reduction in costs and an increase of safety on the road. These particularly include the tire pressure an ... d tread depth check. The automatic tire control system PNEUSCAN helps our customers improve processes for better tire maintenance that promote greater road safety, lower fuel usage, longer tire wear and lower CO2 emissions. E-Mail: info@ventech.de Telefon: +49 2362 9522-4600 Mo. - Fr. von 9:00 bis 16:00Uhr VENTECH Systems GmbH Geschäftsführer: Dr. André Weisz Sitz der Gesellschaft: Halterner Strasse 195 , 46284 Dorsten See More Company Overview Die VENTECH Systems GmbH mit Sitz in Dorsten ist Weltmarktführer im Segment der stationären Reifenkontrollsysteme. VENTECH Systems, ausgezeichnet mit verschiede ... nen Innovations- und Wirtschaftspreisen, entwickelt und vertreibt Diagnosesysteme für die automatisierte Reifeninspektion. Qualität, fundierte Erfahrung und hohe Innovationskraft sowie technologisches Potenzial haben VENTECH Systems zu einem wertvollen Partner auf diesem Gebiet gemacht. Seit fast einer Dekade wird PNEUSCAN bereits in Deutschland entwickelt, produziert und im In- und Ausland installiert. `Made in Germany` mit hochwertigsten Komponenten und innovativem Know-how - dazu gibt es weltweit nichts Vergleichbares. Das modular aufgebaute Reifenkontrollsystem PNEUSCAN ist in zahlreichen Märkten überaus erfolgreich eingeführt. Viele renommierte Unternehmen unterschiedlicher Branchen auf vier Kontinenten setzen mittlerweile zur Steigerung von Wirtschaftlichkeit und Sicherheit auf das stationäre Reifenkontrollsystem PNEUSCAN. Das einzigartige System warnt vor falschem Reifendruck und unzureichender Profiltiefe. Darüber hinaus erkennt es unregelmäßige Reifenprofilabnutzung und ermittelt Achslast und Gesamtgewicht des Fahrzeugs. Weder am Fahrzeug noch an den Reifen ist eine Justierung notwendig. Es kann sowohl im Innen- als auch im Außenbereich eingesetzt werden. Das System wird als Service- und IWartungstool für z. B. Spediteure, Autohäuser, Reifenhändler, Servicecenter, öffentliche und private Busunternehmen sowie im Flottenmanagement eingesetzt. See More Automatische Reifenkontrolle in Sekunden General Information Verkehrssicherheit ist keine Nische und kein Markt, sondern ein gesamtgesellschaftliches Anliegen mit politischem Willen und höchster Priorität. Die VENTECH Sys ... tems GmbH unterstützt diesen Willen durch wegweisende Entwicklungen mit der Möglichkeit einer automatisierten Reifenzustandsmessung. Regelmäßige Reifenkontrollen sind die Basis für eine erhebliche Kostenreduktion und Erhöhung der Sicherheit auf der Straße. Hierzu zählen insbesondere die Prüfung von Reifendruck und Profiltiefe. companies.name: SOLUTIONS & SERVICES
companies.shortDescription:
ABOUT US
Established in 2007 with the Aim to provide a second to none customer focused services within the ELV sector and serving the region for over a decade.
E-Net control systems have been evolving ever-since and our focus is at providing full integration of sophisticated systems and bringing them by simplistic means to clients for providing the best of technology which our industry has to offer.
We pride ourselves for our system solutions and technical expertise by providing turnkey ELV/ICT & Security systems all under the same roof, we have fully pledged highly skilled team covering all systems verticals. Our Engineers are trained and certified from the highest pedigree of globally renowned manufacturers. This enables E-Net to be the one stop solution provider for the entire ELV systems.
You are placed in the safest hands with E-Net, with a longstanding reputable clients, handling acute system integrations across the country, trusted and competitive in the market place. Our Solutions || E-Net is a leading infrastructure solution provider in Sri Lanka, established in 2007. The company delivers innovative and efficient solutions, improving efficiency and quality for its customers. Its product and service portfolio includes ELV systems, ICT systems, SMART HOME solutions, electrical solutions, and consulting services. The company offers structured cabling, data networks, wireless data networks, IP telephony, IPTV, data centers, and more. E-Net also provides industrial and commercial LV systems, LED lighting, and earthing and lightning protection. | E-Net is a leading infrastructure solution provider in Sri Lanka, established in 2007 with a mission to deliver innovative and efficient solutions that improve efficiency and quality for its customers. The company offers a wide range of products and services, including ELV (Electronic Life Vision) systems, ICT (Information and Communication Technology) systems, and SMART HOME solutions. These solutions include structured cabling, data networks, wireless data networks, IP telephony, IPTV, data centers, and more. Additionally, E-Net provides electrical solutions, such as industrial and commercial LV (Low Voltage) systems, LED lighting, and earthing and lightning protection. The company also offers services like consulting, project management, troubleshooting, and emergency breakdown services. With over 11 years of experience and 383 projects completed, E-Net has established itself as a trusted and competitive player in the market. | ABOUT US

companies.name: PCBX
companies.shortDescription:
PCBX is an industry-leading PCB prototype manufacturer that specializes in offering 24-hour quick-turn PCB prototypes, comprehensive PCB assembly services, and dependable small-batch PCB production solutions. The company provides one-stop solutions for customers, including automated inspection, reliable and efficient production, and cost-effective services. With a focus on high-quality at low prices, PCBX offers direct-to-customer ordering without additional fees, allowing customers to benefit from economies of scale and innovative technology. The company's products and services include PCB prototyping, fabrication, manufacturing process, and PCBA solutions, such as SMT assembly and turnkey PCB assembly. With a commitment to customer satisfaction, PCBX provides exceptional customer service, user-friendly online ordering systems, and prompt responses to customer inquiries. || PCBX is a leading manufacturer of printed circuit boards (PCBs), offering rapid prototype production, comprehensive assembly services, and reliable small-batch production solutions. They provide one-stop solutions, including automated inspection, efficient production, and cost-effective services. With a focus on high-quality products at competitive prices, PCBX offers direct ordering and economies of scale. | PCBX is an industry-leading PCB prototype manufacturer that specializes in offering 24-hour quick-turn PCB prototypes, comprehensive PCB assembly services, and dependable small-batch PCB production solutions. The company provides one-stop solutions for customers, including automated inspection, reliable and efficient production, and cost-effective services. With a focus on high-quality at low prices, PCBX offers direct-to-customer ordering without additional fees, allowing customers to benefit from economies of scale and innovative technology. The company's products and services include PCB prototyping, fabrication, manufacturing process, and PCBA solutions, such as SMT assembly and turnkey PCB assembly. With a commitment to customer satisfaction, PCBX provides exceptional customer service, user-friendly online ordering systems, and prompt responses to customer inquiries. | ritchie man***ing referenceFrom France

As an electronics business owner, I've worked with a number of PCB assembly houses over the years, but PCBX has consistently been my top choice. I recently completed another project using their services, and I'm once again extremely satisfied with the results.
In addition to the fast lead times and high-quality work, I've found PCBX's customer service to be exceptional. The online ordering system is also very user-friendly, making the entire process smooth and efficient.

companies.name: SSPE
companies.shortDescription: South Steel Pishgaman Consultant Engineers (SSPE) is a leading engineering services provider for the steel industry in Iran and abroad. With over 20 years of experience, the company offers a range of technical and support services, including feasibility studies, design, supervision, optimization, installation, and planning. Their services cater to various aspects of the steel industry, such as iron ore concentration, pelletizing, direct reduction, steel making, rolling mill, and mining. SSPE's portfolio includes projects for prominent clients like Khuzestan Steel Company, Kaveh East Steel Company, Simidco Company, and the Cuban Ministry of Energy and Mines. The company's expertise also extends to reverse engineering, software and information technology, and industrial automation. With a vision to become the best consulting, design, and engineering services provider for the steel industry, SSPE strives to deliver excellent customer services, innovate, and diversify its offerings. || South Steel Pishgaman Consultant Engineers (SSPE) is a renowned engineering services provider for the steel industry, offering technical and support services to clients globally. With over 20 years of experience, the company provides a range of services, including feasibility studies, design, supervision, optimization, installation, and planning, catering to various aspects of the steel industry. SSPE's portfolio features projects for prominent clients, and the company is committed to delivering excellent customer services, innovating, and diversifying its offerings. | South Steel Pishgaman Consultant Engineers (SSPE) is a leading engineering services provider for the steel industry in Iran and abroad. With over 20 years of experience, the company offers a range of technical and support services, including feasibility studies, design, supervision, optimization, installation, and planning. Their services cater to various aspects of the steel industry, such as iron ore concentration, pelletizing, direct reduction, steel making, rolling mill, and mining. SSPE's portfolio includes projects for prominent clients like Khuzestan Steel Company, Kaveh East Steel Company, Simidco Company, and the Cuban Ministry of Energy and Mines. The company's expertise also extends to reverse engineering, software and information technology, and industrial automation. With a vision to become the best consulting, design, and engineering services provider for the steel industry, SSPE strives to deliver excellent customer services, innovate, and diversify its offerings. | South Steel Pishgaman Consultant Engineers, SSPE is a company that provides engineering services for the steel industry in Iran and abroad. We offer feasibility studies, design, supervision, optimization, installation, planning, capacity and production studies, technology selection and production line design, equipment specification, layout and installation plans, reverse engineering, software and information technology, and industrial automation. They have more than 20 years of experience and have completed or are working on several projects in the fields of iron ore concentration, pelletizing, direct reduction, steel making, rolling mill, and mining. They have also received awards and certificates for their organizational excellence and innovation from national and international organizations. Some of their clients include Khuzestan Steel Company, Kaveh East Steel Company, Simidco Company, and Cuban Ministry of Energy and Mines.

companies.name: Imagotech
companies.shortDescription:
Hardware Development Our electronics development services include circuit- and PCB design. From conception to implementation, we offer professional knowledge to masters the integration of microcontrollers, 8-bit to 32-bit, FPGAs and SoC design in Verilog or VHDL. The focus is on efficient data processing and ensuring optimum performance. With a deep knowledge of analog and digital electronics, we guarantee reliable solutions that meet the highest standards. Rely on our expertise for successful electronics development. 
Software Development Our team focuses on projects involving popular microcontrollers, System-on-Chips (SoCs), and embedded microcontroller cores within Field-Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs). We specialize in providing software solutions for imaging applications on both Linux and Windows platforms. Our goal is to deliver tailored solutions that meet the specific requirements of our clients. Whether it's developing software for image processing, optimizing system performance, or ensuring compatibility across different operating systems, we strive to deliver practical and reliable solutions in the field of embedded systems and imaging technology. Systems Engineering Optimize your operations with our practical Systems Engineering services. We apply efficient methodologies to tailor solutions to your specific needs, ensuring a smooth integration from analysis to implementation. Count on our expertise in applying Systems Engineering to enhance your business and development processes. || Hardware Development Our electronics development services include circuit- and PCB design. Count on our expertise in applying Systems Engineering to enhance your business and development processes.

companies.name: Airco vullen Aalsmeer
companies.shortDescription:
Airco vullen Aalsmeer is a company specializing in air conditioning services for classic cars. They cater to owners of vehicles produced before 1993, which use the R12 refrigerant. The company offers two options to restore the air conditioning system: retrofitting to the newer R134a refrigerant or using a replacement refrigerant, R437a, which is more cost-effective and better for the car's engine. Their service also includes a visual check of the entire air conditioning system, analysis of the system's pressure, and leak testing. || Specializing in air conditioning services for classic cars, Airco vullen Aalsmeer is dedicated to restoring the cooling systems of vehicles produced before 1993. They offer two expert options: retrofitting to the newer R134a refrigerant or using the cost-effective and environmentally friendly R437a replacement refrigerant. Their comprehensive service includes a thorough visual inspection of the entire system, pressure analysis, and leak testing to ensure optimal performance and longevity. | Airco vullen Aalsmeer is a company specializing in air conditioning services for classic cars. They cater to owners of vehicles produced before 1993, which use the R12 refrigerant. The company offers two options to restore the air conditioning system: retrofitting to the newer R134a refrigerant or using a replacement refrigerant, R437a, which is more cost-effective and better for the car's engine. Their service also includes a visual check of the entire air conditioning system, analysis of the system's pressure, and leak testing. | R12 gas komt voor bij airco's in auto's van voor 1993.
Dus rijdt u bijvoorbeeld een mooie Volvo of Mercedes of Porsche Youngtimer van voor 1993, dan geldt dit ook voor u!
Helaas mogen vanaf 2001 deze auto airco's niet meer met dit oude R12 koudemiddel worden (bij)gevuld

Z-LASER Innovative Light for Better Results
Innovative light for better results. This is Z-LASER’s promise and obligation. Located in the heart of the Black Forest in Freiburg, Germany, Z-LASER has been developing and producing innovative, high-quality laser solutions for over 35 years. By providing visual guidance and orientation for people as well as machines, lasers for positioning, lasers for machine vision, and laser projectors from Z-LASER optimize production processes, ensure quality, and contribute to the careful use of resources. || Z-LASER Innovative Light for Better Results

Herzlich willkommen bei Kiesel Konstruktionen
Wir bieten Ihnen einen Rundumservice im Bereich Vorrichtungsbau, Sondermaschinenbau, Automatisierungs- und Prüftechnik.
Als erfahrenes Unternehmen entwickeln wir innovative, kundenspezifische Lösungen und begleiten diese von Entwicklungsphase bis hin zur Umsetzung. Auch nach der Übergabe und Inbetriebnahme Ihrer Vorrichtung bleiben wir gerne noch weiter als Partner an Ihrer Seite und übernehmen für Sie alles rund um Wartung und Instandhaltung. Bei technischen Fragen und Service-Anliegen stehen wir Ihnen jederzeit zur Verfügung.

companies.name: AOT Solution
companies.shortDescription:
Erfahren Sie hier alles Wissenswerte zum Thema Automation & IT bei der AOT Solution. || AOT Solution GmbH
Sehr geehrte Geschäftspartnerinnen / Geschäftspartner,
als Experten im Bereich der industriellen Bildverarbeitung entwickeln und integrieren wir für Sie seit nunmehr 15 Jahren Bildverarbeitungslösungen in höchster Qualität. Ebenfalls haben wir mit unseren Partnerfirmen der AOT-Gruppe bereits verschiedene, fachübergreifende Projekte erfolgreich realisiert.
Wir möchten uns gemeinsam weiterentwickeln und die vorhandenen Synergien der AOT Gruppe bestmöglich nutzen. Daher haben wir uns dazu entschieden, die verschiedenen Geschäftsbereiche der AOT Gruppe in der AO Systems GmbH zusammenzufassen und zu bündeln.
Auf einem gemeinsamen Weg für eine erfolgreiche Zukunft
Wir freuen uns, Ihnen mitteilen zu können, dass die AOT Solution GmbH mit der AO Systems GmbH verschmolzen worden ist und wir Ihnen ab sofort unsere Leistungen im Bereich der industriellen Bildverarbeitung als AO Systems GmbH anbieten können. Unsere Mitarbeiter und Ansprechpartner stehen Ihnen unverändert und wie gewohnt zur Verfügung.
Alles aus einer Hand
Die Fusion hat uns die Möglichkeit gegeben, unser Leistungsportfolio zu erweitern. Die AO Systems GmbH steht nun als Komplettanbieter für Ihre Automatisierungsprojekte zur Verfügung. Neben unserer Expertise in industrieller Bildverarbeitung, Automatisierungstechnik und Robotik haben wir unsere Stärken in den Bereichen der mechanischen Konstruktion, Simulation sowie dem Bau vollständiger Roboterzellen und umfassender Automatisierungslösungen weiter ausgebaut.
Die Umsetzung Ihrer Automatisierungsprojekte – das ist AO Systems
Wir möchten uns für Ihr entgegengebrachtes Vertrauen bedanken und freuen uns darauf, gemeinsam mit Ihnen auf diesem Weg in eine erfolgreiche Zukunft zu gehen. Wenn Sie mehr über unsere Dienstleistungen erfahren möchten oder individuelle Anfragen haben, zögern Sie nicht, uns zu kontaktieren. Unser Team steht Ihnen zur Verfügung.
Neue Kontaktdaten:
AO Systems GmbH
Am Becketal 14
28755 Bremen
info@ao-systems.de
www.ao-systems.de
Telefon: +49 421 278 486 0 | Erfahren Sie hier alles Wissenswerte zum Thema Automation & IT bei der AOT Solution.

companies.name: Boschen-Oetting
companies.shortDescription:
Über uns
Die boschen & oetting Automatisierungs-Bau GmbH entwickelt und baut Sondermaschinen, vor allem für die Automobil-, Leuchtmittel und Pharmabranche.
Zum Angebot gehören die Konstruktion von Werkzeugen, Apparaturen und kompletten vollautomatischen Fertigungsstraßen der
Montage- und Prüftechnik, mit denen Arbeitsprozesse erleichtert werden. Außerdem werden Dienstleistungen wie Umbau, Reparatur, Instandhaltung und Wartung von Produktionsanlagen angeboten. Weiterlesen || Über uns

companies.name: Kiehn Engineering Services
companies.shortDescription:
Kiehn Engineering Services GmbH is a young and small company located in the area of Tuttlingen in Germany. The company offers R&D services with focus on image and signal processing as well as Medical Technologies.
The main activities are:
FPGA programming with VHDL
Algorithm Development
Software Development
Mechanical Engineering
The company was founded in February 2016 by M.Sc. Ralf Kiehn who has worked in the same field as freelancer for some years and as employee for leading companies in Medical Endoscopy.
The aim of the company is to assist you in realizing your product ideas or in the development of test and measurement methods. If desired, we work closely with your development team as well as with cooperation partners. || Kiehn Engineering Services GmbH is a young and small company located in the area of Tuttlingen in Germany.
